description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a predominantly matte gray and off-white finish. The body is composed of a robust polymer or composite material, with a bullpup configuration that places the magazine and action behind the trigger for a compact profile. The upper receiver has a series of geometric ridges and panels, while the lower section includes a large, ergonomic trigger guard and a thumbhole-style grip. The barrel is short and integrated into the body, with no visible muzzle device. There is a small, blue-tinted sighting element on the top, suggesting a basic optical or electronic sight. The overall construction appears lightweight yet durable, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a matte gray and off-white finish, featuring angular panels and a thumbhole grip. It has a short, integrated barrel and a small blue-tinted sight on top.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the angular body, thumbhole grip, and the geometric ridges on the upper receiver.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the slim profile and the blue-tinted sighting element on the upper rail.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the bullpup configuration and the ergonomic trigger guard.
description_view_3: The front view displays the short, integrated barrel and the overall compactness of the rifle.
